message:
fix(formulas): resolve Rubocop style violations

- caam.rb: Move def install outside conditional blocks, use on_intel/on_arm
  DSL instead of if Hardware::CPU checks, use bin/"caam" format in test
- cm.rb, xf.rb: Change '# Note:' to '# NOTE:' for annotation keyword
- ru.rb, ubs.rb: Remove redundant version variable, hardcode version in URL,
  reorder attributes (url before sha256 before license)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,45 +9,32 @@ class Caam < Formula
   license "MIT"
 
   on_macos do
-    if Hardware::CPU.intel?
+    on_intel do
       url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_account_manager/releases/download/v0.1.2/caam_0.1.2_darwin_amd64.tar.gz"
       sha256 "74a122474e6814b1733aea73a39a11a0e6cdec8664e0a3fbfc42b870fdc5466c"
-
-      def install
-        bin.install "caam"
-        generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"caam", "completion")
-      end
     end
-    if Hardware::CPU.arm?
+    on_arm do
       url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_account_manager/releases/download/v0.1.2/caam_0.1.2_darwin_arm64.tar.gz"
       sha256 "065fb48fe89e777ba64986aceaa7af2a9d7479ec6d69a3b3f2ef2c6a0589b538"
-
-      def install
-        bin.install "caam"
-        generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"caam", "completion")
-      end
     end
   end
 
   on_linux do
-    if Hardware::CPU.intel? && Hardware::CPU.is_64_bit?
+    on_intel do
       url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_account_manager/releases/download/v0.1.2/caam_0.1.2_linux_amd64.tar.gz"
       sha256 "d4ee47ca4202b6d7d4d60dda36a4fe5dd0284e938b57c657ba4ab67b68c206b6"
-      def install
-        bin.install "caam"
-        generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"caam", "completion")
-      end
     end
-    if Hardware::CPU.arm? && Hardware::CPU.is_64_bit?
+    on_arm do
       url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_account_manager/releases/download/v0.1.2/caam_0.1.2_linux_arm64.tar.gz"
       sha256 "0e709dafb7471764932ac6feac51585aeebfa4f4203e7f3660d2bc42e78774c7"
-      def install
-        bin.install "caam"
-        generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"caam", "completion")
-      end
     end
   end
 
+  def install
+    bin.install "caam"
+    generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"caam", "completion")
+  end
+
   def caveats
     <<~EOS
       To get started with caam:
@@ -58,6 +45,6 @@ def caveats
   end
 
   test do
-    system "#{bin}/caam", "--version"
+    system bin/"caam", "--version"
   end
 end

@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@ class Cm < Formula
       url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/cass_memory_system/releases/download/v#{version}/cass-memory-linux-x64"
       sha256 "c1cf33be88ca819f8c457f4519334fa99727da42e29832c71e99fd423f1a29f4"
     end
-    # Note: Linux ARM builds not currently available
+    # NOTE: Linux ARM builds not currently available
   end
 
   def install

@@ -4,12 +4,9 @@
 class Ru < Formula
   desc "Robust CLI tool for synchronizing GitHub repositories"
   homepage "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/repo_updater"
-  version "1.2.1"
-  license "MIT"
-
-  # Single script file - same for all architectures
-  url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/repo_updater/releases/download/v#{version}/ru"
+  url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/repo_updater/releases/download/v1.2.1/ru"
   sha256 "7dc465cc5a47102b68a983202b1026d451d767d76c969fe03c6eac1726bf3709"
+  license "MIT"
 
   # Runtime dependencies
   depends_on "git"

@@ -4,12 +4,9 @@
 class Ubs < Formula
   desc "Comprehensive code analysis tool for finding bugs and security issues"
   homepage "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner"
-  version "5.0.6"
-  license "MIT"
-
-  # Single bash script - same for all architectures
-  url "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/v#{version}/ubs"
+  url "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/v5.0.6/ubs"
   sha256 "ebb31bf412a409a19a060f2587c2ea02f185c0bf695204db6c73ef7560d377ed"
+  license "MIT"
 
   # Runtime dependencies
   depends_on "git"

@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@ class Xf < Formula
       url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/xf/releases/download/v#{version}/xf-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz"
       sha256 "e8de166f4464ec46ae6b38d89194e5312f0cce06ae5398df48527d26d5bbe299"
     end
-    # Note: Linux ARM builds not currently available
+    # NOTE: Linux ARM builds not currently available
   end
 
   def install
